title: ilikable Vacuum Shower Caddy Suction Cup No-Drilling Removable Waterproof Bathroom Wall Shelf Shower Basket Storage Organizer for Shampoo Conditioner Razors Soap - White
features: POWERFUL HEAVY DUTY SUCTION CUP - Max Hold to 22 LB - Our shower caddy suction cup use exclusive patented technology suction cup design principle. This bathroom shower organizer suction can hold up to 10KG/22LB. It can firmly stick the wall for 1000 days without falling.

NO NEED TOOLS & ANTI DAMAGE - The shower caddy suction cup bathroom organizer can complete the installation in ONE second. Just press the hook "Push" with the palm of your hand, and you can install it successfully after hearing a "puff" sound. Please clean the wall before installation. (Note: Installation is only successful if you hear a ‘poof’ sound)

UNIQUE VENTILATION AND DRAINAGE DESIGN - This shower shelf suction (30.48x12x 20.9cm) bottom is sloping design(-6° tilt). Combining with hollowed bottom design can effectively drain excess water, prevent stagnant water and keep the contents dry.

EDGE GROOVE HOOK - SAVING MORE SPACE - The side of the shower caddy organizer has groove hook which can hang small bathroom supplies such as razors, bath balls, head ropes, necklaces, bracelets, etc. The wall-mounted shower caddy suction can be decorated in anywhere you want, to storage shampoo, conditioner, soap and kitchen tools.

APPLICATION WALLS - The suction cup can only be applied to smooth and non-porous surface, like ceramic tile, glass(fiber glass except), smooth wood, metal, flat marbles, or other unpainted surfaces.Please do not affix to painted, cracked or uneven walls, otherwise it may fall off.
